info.title: Greenhouse Harvest API
info.description: The Greenhouse Harvest API provides programmatic access to your Greenhouse recruiting data including jobs, candidates, applications, interviews, and other recruiting workflow data.

get.description: List all of an organization's candidates.

parameters.name: On-Behalf-Of
parameters.description: ID of the user issuing this request.

Add a note to a candidate.

basicAuth.description: Use your Greenhouse API token as the username and leave the password blank. Base64 encode the string 'token:' for the Authorization header.

perPage.name: per_page
perPage.description: Number of records to return per page (1-500, default 100).

skipCount.name: skip_count
skipCount.description: If true, the 'last' link in the Link header is omitted, improving performance.

createdBefore.name: created_before
createdBefore.description: Return records created before this timestamp.

createdAfter.name: created_after
createdAfter.description: Return records created after this timestamp.

updatedBefore.name: updated_before
updatedBefore.description: Return records updated before this timestamp.

updatedAfter.name: updated_after
updatedAfter.description: Return records updated after this timestamp.
